auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Browse AI secret API key passed in the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in the API tab of your Browse AI dashboard: https://help.browse.ai/en/articles/12683249-api-guide-getting-started.

actions.name: get_robot
actions.description: Retrieve one Browse AI robot and its input parameter definitions by robot ID.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving one Browse AI robot.

type.description: The Browse AI input parameter type.

name.description: The parameter name used in task inputParameters.

required.description: Whether the parameter is required when running the robot.

encrypted.description: Whether the parameter value is masked by Browse AI.

anyOf.description: A string input parameter value.
A numeric input parameter value.
A list of selected string values.
A Browse AI input parameter value.
A null parameter value.

defaultValue.description: A Browse AI input parameter value or null.

anyOf.description: A string input parameter value.
A numeric input parameter value.
A list of selected string values.
A Browse AI input parameter value.
A null parameter value.

value.description: A Browse AI input parameter value or null.

min.description: The minimum numeric value accepted by the parameter.

max.description: The maximum numeric value accepted by the parameter.

label.description: The display label of the select option.

value.description: The submitted value of the select option.

items.description: One select option supported by a Browse AI robot input parameter.

options.description: The select options available for this parameter.

items.description: One Browse AI robot input parameter definition.

inputParameters.description: The input parameters supported by the Browse AI robot.

outputSchema.description: The Browse AI robot lookup response.

actions.name: get_robot_task
actions.description: Retrieve one Browse AI robot task and its captured data by robot and task IDs.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving one Browse AI robot task.

anyOf.description: A string input parameter value.
A numeric input parameter value.
A list of selected string values.

additionalProperties.description: A Browse AI input parameter value.

inputParameters.description: The inputParameters object accepted by a Browse AI robot task.

robotId.description: The Browse AI robot ID that owns the task.

status.description: The normalized Browse AI task status.

anyOf.description: The Browse AI user ID that started the task from the dashboard.
The Browse AI bulk run ID associated with the task.
The Browse AI monitor ID that started the task.

runByAPI.description: Whether the task was started through the API.

anyOf.description: A Unix timestamp in milliseconds, or null when the value is unavailable.
A Unix timestamp in milliseconds, or null when the value is unavailable.
The human-readable error returned when the task fails.

triedRecordingVideo.description: Whether Browse AI attempted to record a video for the task.

anyOf.description: The Browse AI task video URL.
A Unix timestamp in milliseconds, or null when the value is unavailable.
The original failed task ID that Browse AI retried.
The retry task ID created by Browse AI for this task.
The temporary Browse AI URL for downloading large captured data.
A captured text value, or null when Browse AI captured an empty field.

capturedTexts.description: Captured text fields keyed by the Browse AI capture name.

anyOf.description: The screenshot name.

x.description: The screenshot X offset in pixels.

y.description: The screenshot Y offset in pixels.

deviceScaleFactor.description: The device scale factor used to capture the screenshot.

anyOf.description: The screenshot coverage mode, such as page or viewport.
The screenshot ID used for Browse AI diff comparisons.
The diff image URL highlighting screenshot changes.

changePercentage.description: The percentage of changed pixels compared with the previous screenshot.

diffThreshold.description: The configured screenshot change threshold percentage.

anyOf.description: A Unix timestamp in milliseconds, or null when the value is unavailable.

additionalProperties.description: One captured screenshot returned by Browse AI.

capturedScreenshots.description: Captured screenshots keyed by the Browse AI screenshot capture name.

anyOf.description: A captured text value, or null when Browse AI captured an empty field.

items.description: One captured Browse AI list row keyed by column name.

additionalProperties.description: The rows captured for a Browse AI list.

capturedLists.description: Captured lists keyed by the Browse AI list name.

outputSchema.description: The Browse AI robot task lookup response.

actions.name: update_robot_cookies
actions.description: Update the cookies stored on one Browse AI robot.

anyOf.description: The cookie value as a string.
The cookie value as a number that will be serialized as a string.

expirationDate.description: The cookie expiration time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

hostOnly.description: Whether the cookie is restricted to the exact host.

items.description: One Browse AI robot cookie update payload.

cookies.description: The cookies that should be stored on the Browse AI robot.

inputSchema.description: The input for updating Browse AI robot cookies.

expirationDate.description: The cookie expiration time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

hostOnly.description: Whether the cookie is restricted to the exact host.

cookies.description: The cookies returned by Browse AI after the update.

outputSchema.description: The Browse AI robot cookie update response.
